description: Business letter in Arabic script. The sender requests the copper jars and in exchange he will send the qinṭār of sugar cane molasses (quṭāra). Mentions the town of Minyat Zifta. Mentions people such as Abū l-Majd, the amīr ʿIzz(?) al-Dīn, al-Rayyis Sulaymān, al-Rayyis ʿAlī, and Abū ʿAlī Sulaymān. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
